name: Strawberry Upside Down Shortcake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages frozen sliced strawberries in syrup (10 oz.), thawed (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously grease the bottom of a 13 x 9 pan; sprinkle marshmallows evenly over the bottom.
2. Thoroughly combine thawed strawberries and syrup with dry gelatin; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine remaining ingredients. Blend at low speed until moistened.
4. Beat for 3 minutes at medium speed.
5. Pour batter evenly over marshmallows.
6. Spoon strawberry mixture evenly over batter.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
8. Serve warm or cool with ice cream.
Check often right before cooking time is finished to prevent the marshmallows from scorching. The strawberries will settle at the bottom, the cake part will stay in the middle, and the marshmallows will rise to the top.
